.github/workflows/camel-test-drives.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 for the build environment.

jeorg-camel-app-atm/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-war-plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the unified release flag for Java 9+.
Migrate JAXB API dependency from javax namespace to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE standards.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run as Java 17 code, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version that supports the 'release' flag and Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support the 'release' flag or may fail to compile against JDK 21 toolchains.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated 'source' and 'target' compiler configuration with the modern 'release' flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using 'source' and 'target' with JDK 21 can lead to classpath mismatches (e.g., using JDK 21 rt.jar with older API levels) or warnings; 'release' is the standard for cross-compilation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Guava dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Guava (e.g., 19.0) may contain bytecode or internal API usage incompatible with JDK 21 strictures or removed APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok (e.g., 1.18.22) may not support Java 21 language features or may fail during annotation processing on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of JaCoCo (e.g., 0.8.7) may fail to instrument or analyze classes compiled with JDK 21 due to class file version mismatches.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update JAXB API dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: JAXB was removed from the JDK in Java 11; while the API is external, ensuring a compatible version is necessary for runtime stability on newer JDKs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate JAXB dependency from javax.xml.bind to jakarta.xml.bind namespace.
pom.xml.why_exists: The javax.xml.bind namespace is deprecated and may be removed or cause conflicts in modern Jakarta EE environments; jakarta.xml.bind is the current standard.
